creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Jan 4, 2011 at 12:06 PM, SHIOZAKI Takehiko <st@be.to> wrote:
> Hi TAKATSU-san
>
> [On Jan =A02, TAKATSU Tomonari <tota@FreeBSD.org> wrote:]
>
>>I have modified your patch with refering to ports/mail/mutt-devel as foll=
ows.
>>
>>- Make use of grouping rules for DISTFILES and MASTER_SITES
>>- Use PKGNAMESUFFIX to make portlint happy
>>- Add OPTIONS
>
> Thank you very much for your modification indeed.
> They look quite good for me.
> I'm just wondering, however, where extra-patch-nodoc-contrib has gone.

Oops!
I forgot to "cvs add" files/extra-patch-nodoc-contrib.
I'm about to commit them with the missing file.

Regards,

-- 
TAKATSU Tomonari
